name: Liberty Bancorp (South San Francisco, CA)
summary: Liberty Bancorp (South San Francisco, CA) operates as the bank holding company for Liberty Bank that provides banking products and services. The company offers personal, discount, interest, and business checking accounts, as well as money market accounts; savings accounts; certificates of deposits; individual retirement accounts; ATM/debit and credit cards; and merchant cards. It also provides personal, commercial real estate, construction, equipment, consumer, and term loans, as well as secured and unsecured credit lines, and home equity lines of credit. In addition, the company offers cash management, night depository, payroll, remote deposit capture, check reorder, and theft protection services; cashier's checks; direct deposits; safe deposit boxes; and telephone and online banking, and wire transfer services. It operates three full service branches in South San Francisco, Boulder Creek, and Felton, California. The company is based in South San Francisco, California.
